name: Align Technology, Inc.
h1: Align Technology's GCC footprint in India
lede: Align Technology runs two centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and Hyderabad, covering GBS and R&D, built over nineteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Align Technology office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Align Technology, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Align Technology runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Mumbai, Hyderabad), covering GBS and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: India Director - Align Innovation Center and Invisalign R&D

about.description: Align Technology's India footprint covers Mumbai and Hyderabad, spanning GBS and R&D. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all thirteen decision-makers, in one profile.
